flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Crafton Hills College rose 344% between 2016 and 2019 (9.0% → 40.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Crafton Hills College rose 71% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $14.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Crafton Hills College fell 28% between 2009 and 2010 (11.8% → 8.5%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Crafton Hills College rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 (3.9k → 5.4k).
